
# Static Analysis, briefly {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_talk-intro.qmd >}}

{{< include /static/_talk-uaf-example.qmd >}}

## static analysis limits? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_static-limits.qmd >}}

## analysis for common insecure patterns {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_clang-static-patterns.qmd >}}
